svg.title: Tracking Monkey Typing: commits, lines, and tokens
svg.desc: Tracking Monkey Typing shows aggregate weekly commits and line movement, followed by a separately scoped lifetime-token snapshot. Code movement, last five years at weekly grain. Totals: 3,271 commits, 32,782,647 additions, 31,205,447 deletions, and 160 active weeks. The commit axis uses log1p; the signed additions and deletions axis uses symmetric log. Rounded combined Codex lifetime: 52.1B tokens, observed Jul 24, 2026. This is one dated snapshot, not a reconstructed history. It is combined before publication; per-source readings and identities are not published. Provenance: automatic refresh. The approximate conversion is ~$41.5K using this site's current blended public API replay rate of 0.796269 dollars per million tokens as of 2026-07-12; it is not an actual bill.
svg.text: Five years of code movement, plus one dated lifetime token snapshot
